title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Max Fashion

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Max Fashion
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Max Fashion! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Varanasi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Max Fashion:
Max Fashion is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Fashion!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
